docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT AS TO DEFENDANT SQUIRES, TERESA D JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
